goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review intake builder for release-governance approved-action request packets while keeping merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Release-governance approved-action request packets can be accepted for authority review without merging or external action.
Authority review, reviewer, and intake evidence refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual authority decision, action execution, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority ref, and blocked request packet cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-098 converted release-governance approved-action readiness into a request packet without merge or external action.
